invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破70000（关键支撑）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 70000 (key support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破2150（阻力位）或融资费率Z-score降至50%以下（多头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 2150 (resistance) or funding rate Z-score drops below 50% (long pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破650（阻力位）或融资费率Z-score降至30%以下（多头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 650 (resistance) or funding rate Z-score drops below 30% (long pressure easing).
